operation.name: InsertOrUpdate
operation.sql: INSERT INTO dialog_filters (user_id, dialog_filter_id, slug, title, order_value, enabled, deleted, filter_schema_version, filter_payload) VALUES (:user_id, :dialog_filter_id, :slug, :title, :order_value, :enabled, :deleted, :filter_schema_version, :filter_payload) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE slug = VALUES(slug), title = VALUES(title), order_value = VALUES(order_value), enabled = VALUES(enabled), deleted = VALUES(deleted), filter_schema_version = VALUES(filter_schema_version), filter_payload = VALUES(filter_payload)

operation.name: SelectBySlug
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, dialog_filter_id, slug, title, order_value, enabled, deleted, filter_schema_version, filter_payload FROM dialog_filters WHERE user_id = :user_id AND slug = :slug AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

operation.name: Select
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, dialog_filter_id, slug, title, order_value, enabled, deleted, filter_schema_version, filter_payload FROM dialog_filters WHERE user_id = :user_id AND dialog_filter_id = :dialog_filter_id AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectList
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, dialog_filter_id, slug, title, order_value, enabled, deleted, filter_schema_version, filter_payload FROM dialog_filters WHERE user_id = :user_id AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_value ASC

operation.name: UpdateOrder
operation.sql: UPDATE dialog_filters SET order_value = :order_value WHERE user_id = :user_id AND dialog_filter_id = :dialog_filter_id

operation.name: Clear
operation.sql: UPDATE dialog_filters SET deleted = 1, enabled = 0, order_value = 0 WHERE user_id = :user_id AND dialog_filter_id = :dialog_filter_id
